nearLimit.en: You are close to this week's free limit. Unlock Plus for 1,000 monthly conversations and 40+ scenarios.
nearLimit.zh: 你快达到本周免费额度了。升级 Plus，解锁每月 1000 次对话和 40+ 练习场景。

scenarioLocked.en: This scenario is available in Plus. Start your 30-day guarantee plan anytime.
scenarioLocked.zh: 该场景为 Plus 权益。可随时开通，享受 30 天保障。

streakMomentum.en: You're building momentum. Plus gives you structured daily plans to keep improving.
streakMomentum.zh: 你的练习势头很好。Plus 提供结构化每日计划，帮助持续进步。

prioritySupportAutoReply.subjectZh: 【AURAE VOICE】已收到你的优先支持请求
prioritySupportAutoReply.bodyEn: Thanks for contacting Priority Support. We usually reply within 12 hours. Please include: account email, device/browser, issue screenshot, and scenario ID if applicable.
prioritySupportAutoReply.bodyZh: 感谢联系优先支持，我们通常会在 12 小时内回复。请补充：账号邮箱、设备/浏览器、问题截图，以及相关场景 ID（如有）。
